name: Meringue Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg whites until very stiff.
2. Slowly add sugar, baking powder, and vanilla to the egg whites.
3. Stir in the broken crackers by hand.
4. Add the chopped pecans.
5. Pour into a well-buttered 9-inch pie pan, making sure to butter the edge and rim of the pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes.
7. Serve with ice cream or fresh fruit and whipped cream.
Serves 5 to 6
Source: "Mountain Measures" -- Junior League of Charleston, WV, ed. 1974
